lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Hello, I've just finished composing my latest poem. Would you like to hear it?

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Excellent! The humans an aficionado! Make yourself comfortable and I'll begin...

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Twinkle, twinkle little egg Wouldn't you like to grow some legs? And run around, on grass so green arguing with the milk and cream.

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: T'was brillig and the slithey toathes Did gyre and gimbol in the wabe All mimsy were the borrowgroves And the mome raths outgrabe.

lines.speaker: Cow
lines.text: That's not even your poem, you idiotic, animated ball of wool!

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: How now foolish cow? Do you read poetry, instead of pulling a plow?

lines.speaker: Cow
lines.text: I'm not talking to you any more, you're nasty.

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Oh no! Cow's not talking to me!

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Do I look like I care?

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: I wish I was a cow My life would be so simple I could lie around just eating grass And wonder if I was a pimple.

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Well I thought it was funny.

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: How goes it, blade of grass? I'm glad you're not any thinner You should invite your friends around So I can have my dinner!

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: Huh, the cow's right. You humans have absolutely no understanding of art!

sections.title: Using Nuff's certificate on an unsheared sheep

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know what these strange marks mean?

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: The humans found some symbols And doesn't know what they mean So now it's cross-examining me And spoiling my routine!

lines.speaker: Sheep
lines.text: You give me a hair-cut and then expect me to talk to you? I think not!
